companyName.zh: 博世加速器 —— 探索组合旅程

summary.en: Bosch Accelerator illustrates the Explore side of portfolio management: many early teams enter the funnel, most are retired through evidence, and a few persevere or transfer toward exploitation when risk drops enough.
summary.zh: 博世加速器展示了组合管理的 Explore 探索侧：大量早期团队进入漏斗，多数根据证据被终止，少数在风险下降后继续坚持或转入开发。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Bosch Accelerator example
Bosch public innovation and accelerator materials

project.name: Bosch Accelerator — explore portfolio journey
project.description: Explore portfolio funnel inspired by The Invincible Company.

pins.label: 200 early teams
pins.body: Many ideas enter with high innovation risk and little evidence.

pins.label: Retired majority
pins.body: Most ideas should be killed cheaply when evidence is weak.

pins.label: 60 teams remain
pins.body: Teams continue when evidence supports the next hypothesis.

pins.label: 15 scaling teams
pins.body: Risk falls as desirability, feasibility, viability, and adaptability evidence grows.

pins.label: Transfer to business
pins.body: De-risked projects need a home in the exploit portfolio.

stickies.text: Internal venture teams, business units, future industrial customers
A disciplined exploration funnel that learns cheaply
Accelerator cohorts, internal sponsors, business-unit transfer paths
Future transferred businesses and strategic options
Teams, mentors, experiment budget, industrial expertise
Business units, customers, technical experts, venture coaches
Small experiment budgets, coaching time, team allocation

canvases.title: 博世加速器探索组合旅程

pins.label: 200 个早期团队
pins.body: 大量想法以高创新风险和低证据状态进入。

pins.label: 多数被终止
pins.body: 当证据不足时，应以低成本快速杀掉多数想法。

pins.label: 60 个团队留下
pins.body: 当证据支持下一条关键假设时，团队继续测试。

pins.label: 15 个规模化团队
pins.body: 当可取性、可行性、可盈利性和适应性证据增强时，风险下降。

pins.label: 转入业务
pins.body: 已降风险的项目需要在开发组合中找到承接位置。

stickies.text: 内部创业团队、业务单元、未来工业客户
用纪律化探索漏斗低成本学习
加速器批次、内部赞助人、业务单元转入路径
教练辅导、证据评审、赞助人对齐

团队、导师、实验预算、工业专业知识
构想、测试、终止、坚持、转入

stories.title: Bosch Accelerator explore portfolio journey
stories.contentMd:
# Bosch Accelerator explore portfolio journey

Bosch is useful for reading the Explore side of the Portfolio Map. Exploration is not a single big bet; it is a managed funnel where many ideas enter, evidence reduces uncertainty, and only a few ideas deserve transfer into the existing business portfolio.

## Portfolio reading

The map deliberately shows many teams starting in high-risk territory. The portfolio becomes healthier when weak ideas are retired early, promising teams persevere with stronger experiments, and a few de-risked models transfer toward exploitation.

## Transfer lesson

Explore portfolio management should make failure cheap and learning visible. The goal is not to keep every idea alive, but to produce a few credible future growth engines without betting the company too early.

stories.title: 博世加速器探索组合旅程
stories.contentMd:
# 博世加速器探索组合旅程

博世适合用来阅读 Portfolio Map 的 Explore 探索侧。探索不是一次大型下注，而是一个被管理的漏斗：大量想法进入，证据逐步降低不确定性，只有少数想法值得转入现有业务组合。

## 组合阅读

组合图刻意展示许多团队从高风险区域出发。当弱想法被尽早终止，有潜力的团队用更强实验继续坚持，少数已降风险模型转向开发侧时，组合会更健康。

## 转移经验

探索组合管理应该让失败变便宜，让学习变可见。目标不是让每个想法都活着，而是在不过早押上公司的前提下，产出少数可信的未来增长引擎。
